zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Berkeley於1406年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆時，她的父親Sir Lawrence Berkeley19歲，母親Joan Woodford17歲。她於1424年之前與Sir Thomas Woodford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1498年在她的家鄉享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Berkeley于1406年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Lawrence Berkeley19岁，母亲Joan Woodford17岁。她于1424年之前与Sir Thomas Woodford在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1498年在她的家乡享年92岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Berkeley was born in 1406, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, was 19 and her mother, Joan Woodford, was 17. She married Sir Thomas Woodford before 1424, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1498, in her hometown, at the age of 92, and was buried in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Woodford avant 1424, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1498, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas Woodford prima del 1424, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. ko.Sempringham, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Berkeley(이)가 1406년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Berkeley(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Woodford(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1424년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas Woodford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 그녀의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에 묻혔다.

ru.Sempringham, Lincolnshire, England: семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Burnham-On-Crouch, Essex, England: бурнам он кроуч, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Berkeley родилась в 1406 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Berkeley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Woodford, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Woodford перед 1424 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1498 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Woodford antes de 1424, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1498, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
